avatar.desc: Render an avatar item side (does not include QAvatar component, just styles the wrapper)
avatar.desc_cn: 渲染头像区块样式（不包含 QAvatar 组件，只设置包装器样式）

thumbnail.desc: Render a thumbnail item side (does not include QImg component, just styles the wrapper)
thumbnail.desc_cn: 渲染缩略图区块样式（不包含 QImg 组件，只设置包装器样式）

side.desc: Renders as a side item (has specific styling like alignment, padding)
side.desc_cn: 渲染为侧边项（具有特定样式如对齐、内边距）

top.desc: Align content to top (useful when content has more than one line)
top.desc_cn: 将内容对齐到顶部（当内容超过一行时有用）

no-wrap.desc: Do not wrap text (useful for single line content like 'secondary' text)
